# DenseNeuroHyperVec { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec(data, space, label='')
```

Dense 5D+ neuroimaging hypervector.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                           | Description               | Default    |
|--------|------------------------------------------------|---------------------------|------------|
| data   | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)       | 5D+ data array            | _required_ |
| space  | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`) | 5D+ spatial metadata      | _required_ |
| label  | [str](`str`)                                   | Label for the hypervector | `''`       |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [apply_feature_func](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.apply_feature_func) | Apply function across features at each voxel/time. |
| [mean_features](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.mean_features) | Average across feature dimension. |
| [mean_time_features](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.mean_time_features) | Average across both time and feature dimensions. |
| [select_features](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.select_features) | Select subset of features. |
| [series](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.series) | Extract time series for given coordinates. |
| [squeeze_features](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.squeeze_features) | Remove single feature dimension. |
| [std_features](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.std_features) | Standard deviation across features. |
| [weighted_mean_features](#neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.weighted_mean_features) | Compute weighted mean across features. |

### apply_feature_func { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.apply_feature_func }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.apply_feature_func(func)
```

Apply function across features at each voxel/time.

### mean_features { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.mean_features }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.mean_features()
```

Average across feature dimension.

### mean_time_features { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.mean_time_features }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.mean_time_features()
```

Average across both time and feature dimensions.

### select_features { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.select_features }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.select_features(indices)
```

Select subset of features.

### series { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.series }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.series(coords, feature=None)
```

Extract time series for given coordinates.

### squeeze_features { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.squeeze_features }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.squeeze_features()
```

Remove single feature dimension.

### std_features { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.std_features }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.std_features(time_idx=None)
```

Standard deviation across features.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type         | Description                                                         | Default   |
|----------|--------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| time_idx | [int](`int`) | If provided, compute std at specific time point and return NeuroVol | `None`    |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                                                           | Description                                        |
|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
|        | [DenseNeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.DenseNeuroVol`) or [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`) | 3D volume if time_idx provided, otherwise 4D array |

### weighted_mean_features { #neuroim.DenseNeuroHyperVec.weighted_mean_features }

```python
DenseNeuroHyperVec.weighted_mean_features(weights)
```

Compute weighted mean across features.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type                                     | Description              | Default    |
|---------|------------------------------------------|--------------------------|------------|
| weights | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`) | Weights for each feature | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                               | Description         |
|--------|----------------------------------------------------|---------------------|
|        | [DenseNeuroVec](`neuroim.neuro_vec.DenseNeuroVec`) | 4D weighted average |
